notes: SHIP v1.14.225 — COMMAND LENS STAT-CARD TAP-THROUGHS (per owner handoff). The three Command Center stat cards (RACKS / BLOCKERS / DEPLOYS) were pure display; now the full card is tappable and re-homes to the existing Work surface via the app's own nav calls ('re-home don't rebuild' — no new routing). WIRING (in cmd_render @18112, a key->route map keyed on the existing card key racks/block/dep): RACKS -> rd_openOpsTool('rackmap') (the CANONICAL Rack Map Work door — byte-identical to the Work RACK MAP card @12209; lands on the elevation/floor, owner-confirmed floor-map view). BLOCKERS -> cmd_route('work','issues') -> showWorkTab('issues') -> issue_pageOpen (the blockers/issues list). DEPLOYS -> cmd_route('work','deploy') -> deploy_showCommandCenter (active deploys list; same call the Command signal rows already use @18122). Full-card hit area (onclick + role=button + tabindex=0 on the whole .stat, not just the number). Press affordance: new .cc-tap class + CSS (@8871) cursor:pointer + :active { transform:scale(.97); brightness(1.18) } so the row reads tappable. BLOCKERS-at-00: still navigates to the issues list (which renders its own empty state), NEVER a dead tap on zero. The owner-flagged caution ('do not funnel more traffic into showWorkTab's silent catch before the bug hunt ships') is RESOLVED: the instrument shipped .221 (the ~17212 catch is un-silenced + fallback card) and the deploy dead-render classes were fixed .223/.224, so all three routes go through now-fixed, instrumented paths. LEGACY: cmd_render renders #pg-cmd only under redesign (the New-UI Command page); legacy (?legacy=1) never creates .cc-tap cards, and the CSS matches nothing there -> byte-identical. Additive only: 1 route-map + card-render tweak, 2 CSS lines. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks · CSS brace balance · CRLF · three-stamp lockstep .224->.225 · route map present + all 3 targets wired. ROLLBACK: git revert clean. DEVICE-VERIFY (batch, HARD STOP): update to v1.14.225, on the Command Center: (1) the three stat cards now show a press state (scale/brighten) on touch and the WHOLE card is tappable; (2) tap RACKS -> Rack Map floor for the active Master; (3) tap DEPLOYS -> Work Deploy list (the in-flight deployments); (4) tap BLOCKERS with a non-zero count -> blockers list; (5) tap BLOCKERS when it reads 00 -> still opens the blockers list with its empty state (NOT a dead tap); (6) ?legacy=1 -> Command cards unchanged (no tap-through, no press state). STILL OWED in the batch (within the 6-cap; owner verifying incrementally): .220 3D parity, .221 SYS->ERRORS panel, .222 Forge Stage 1 (SYS->FORGE 3D), .224 ops-content dead-tap sweep. (.223 deploy card DEVICE-VERIFIED 2026-07-10.) NEXT: version badge (§10), then consolidated .218-.225 tracker roll (CLAUDE.md + memory).
